---
title: "Group 3 Page"
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      ensureHtmlElements:
        -
          - 'a.sidebar-logo-link img[src$="logo-a.png"][class*="sidebar-logo"]'
        - []
---

This page belongs to the third sidebar entry which has no explicit logo. It should inherit logo-a.png from the first sidebar.
